Chevrox Best Energy Investment Company

Trading on stock commodities such as petroleum, gold and agriculture.

Chevrox is a company with many years of experience in Petroleum, Gold and Agriculture Investments. The well-coordinated and diligent work of our team of traders, analysts, IT-specialists, as well as the right strategies of investment distribution is the key to a successful company.

01 About company our professional
& experienced team

Our greatest resource is our people. Their ingenuity, creativity and collaboration have met the complex challenges of energy’s past. Together, we’ll take on the future.We’re leaders in energy because we value responsibility, trust and integrity. This unwavering dedication to quality drives our company culture and will keep us ahead for years to come.We at Chevrox, we define Energy in Human Terms

Chevrox is a company with many years of experience in Petroleum, Agriculture and Gold Investments.The well-coordinated and diligent work of our team of traders, analysts, IT-specialists, as well as the right strategies of investment distribution is the key to a successful company.
Chevrox is a stock commodity company which deals on mostly petroleum, gold and agriculture commodities. We accept cryptocurrency as one of the payment method of the company

Read more

02 5 reasonsto trust us

Investment safety 1

Strategies based on risk minimization and obtaining maximum benefits, as well as efficient algorithms for protection of the personal data of each user are the key to investment security.

Team of professionals 2

The close-knit team of the Company consists of the best experts in their field. We managed to form an integral community consisting of analysts, traders, managers, economists - a community of professionals in their field of expertise.

24/7 support 3

In turn, we provide every customer with round-the-clock technical support. Our operators are ready to solve problems quickly and provide necessary information at the time convenient for you.

Unlimited investment term 4

We did not create any certain time limits and restrictions, so everyone has the right to choose independently for what period of time they want to cooperate with our company.

Guaranteed profit 5

Stable payouts and guaranteed profit are Company's main obligations in respect to its investors.

check certificate
Officially registered
company chevrox.ltd is an officially registered company with the Companies House registration number: 94-0890210 D-U-N-S Number: 94-0890210

03 Investment plans our flexible
investment offer

Investment details

Investment openness and availability for all comers have always been the main objectives of our activities and will remain so in the future.

We offer 3 main investment packages which are Agriculture, Gold and Petroleum. And also those packages has it's sub- packages in it with it's profits percentage

AGRICULTURAL PACKAGE
It has two sectors which are The Agro- Sector and Equity sector
Agro-sector
Starts with a minimum of $50 and gives a profits of 5.2% in 24hrs Referral commission: 2%
Equity sector
Starts with a minimum of $550 and gives a profits of 6.5% in 24hrs. Referral commission:3%

GOLD PACKAGE
It has two sectors which are Standard Sector and Mining Sector
Mining Sector
starts with a minimum of $700 and gives a profits of 7.3% in 48hrs
Standard sector
Starts with a minimum of $1200 and gives a profits of 8.5% in 48hrs




PETROLEUM PACKAGE
It has 3 sectors which are the Upstream, downstream and midstream sectors.
Upstream Sector
It starts with a minimum of $1000 and gives a profits of 10% in 72hrs. Referral commission:6%
Midstream Sector
It starts with a minimum of $5000 and gives a profits of 15% in 72hrs. Referral commission: 7%
Downstream Sector
It starts with a minimum of $25000 and gives a profits of 10% in 72hrs. Referral commission: 8%

Profit accrual depends on the investment plan of your choice and is made on a daily basis or after a 24 hours - 72 hours period from the deposit creation. Profit is automatically accrued to your personal balance under the condition of an active deposit. Each registered user has a right to create unlimited number of deposits.

Profit obtained through investment can be withdrawn at any moment that suits you.

Withdrawal requests are processed immediately, the minimum amount permitted for withdrawals is 1 USD with dollar and 3 USD with crypto.


  • 7% level 1
  • 3% level 2
  • 1% level 3

04 Referral program for partners
and representatives

Each registered user automatically becomes our partner. Distribute your referral link among your friends and acquaintances and get an extra profit under the referral program.

chevrox.ltd also offers its investors a four-level referral system with the opportunity of becoming a company representative in their region. The representative status implies your direct participation in the work of the Company.


Become a representative
  • 10% level 1
  • 4% level 2
  • 2% level 3
  • 1% level 4
we partner with ByBit
